name: Intro
_source: m;A Hint of Things to Come

s;;With Krista back in the hands of her allies,|the group plans their final assault on Circ's Talons.|The Talons themselves launch their own attack on our heroes.|It is only a matter of time until their forces reach them...;StyleNid=overworld_narration
for;EnemyGender;[unit.nid for unit in game.get_enemy_units() if unit.generic == True and 'NoVariant' not in unit.tags]
# The party retreats back to Medeas Castle after rescuing Krista. Circ's Talons send out the Dead Lords led by Ervan as a desperation attack on the party.

s;Krista;Everyone.{w} First off, I want to say thanks to all of you.|You decided to stay by my side despite knowing the truth behind Ervan's death.|{c:e;Krista;CloseEyes}I won't take this for granted.|I can say "thank you" over and over for a millenia and it still wouldn't be enough.|{c:e;Krista;NormalBlink}Secondly, we'll be facing Circ's Talons head on.|I have no doubt Ervan will be among them too.|We've seen what they're capable of before. We know we can't take them lightly.|{c:e;Krista;CloseEyes}Be smart. Be vigilant.|{c:e;Krista;HalfCloseEyes}I{tgm}...{tgm} I can't bear to lose more people that I care about.|{c:e;Krista;NormalBlink}So, do your best and stay alive!|We've got a world to save!
s;Krista;Everyone{tgm}...{w}{c:e;Krista;CloseEyes,Smile}{tgm} You're all too good to me.{w} Seriously.
# Insert dialogue about how left behind units are now enemies.
change_unit_desc;Ervan;Former prince of Fuegsol.{br}Consumed with bitterness and a betrayed heart.
prep;true;Prepare to Charge;Guide;True;AccessLibrary;Access the guide for tips and tricks.;gba;no_chap_disp
